blurb: Nova Commerce is a synthetic e-commerce platform team: 8 people, 9 sprints, 6 epics — rebuilding checkout, hardening payments, and shipping a loyalty programme. The data is seeded with realistic trouble to find: an overloaded engineer, a blocker chain, and a critical epic running late.

anomalies.title: One migration is holding up four issues
anomalies.detail: NOVA-2107 'Migrate to payment gateway SDK v3' blocks 4 issues across Checkout and Payments.

anomalies.title: Priya is at ~140% capacity this sprint
anomalies.detail: Payments work has funnelled to one engineer in Sprint 9 — the utilisation chart shows the overload.

anomalies.title: Checkout Redesign is in the Critical risk band
anomalies.detail: Only about a third of the scope is done after eight sprints and roughly a third is blocked — mostly behind the payments SDK migration.
